ddls:
CREATE TABLE "observational_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Description of the station's location */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the station */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the station */,
  "established_date" TEXT /* Date when the station was established */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for login */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for login (hashed and salted) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, data_entry, analyst) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., JSON object or string) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
column_names: Date when the station was established
Role of the user (e.g., admin, data_entry, analyst)
Permissions associated with the role (e.g., JSON object or string)
